case_title: PENSKE TRUCK LEASING CO vs. SAN FRANCISCO FRESH CRAB AKA SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENSKE TRUCK LEASING CO AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FRESH CRAB AKA SAN FRANCISCO CRAB COMPANY AKA SAN FRANCISCO FRESH CRAB CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-15-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR JUN-18-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENSKE TRUCK LEASING CO

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-18-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS OR PROOF OF PUBLICATION. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY JAMES Z. MARGOLIS. HEARING SET FOR SEP-17-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-17-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-17-1997, TO FILE POS. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY JAMES Z MARGOLIS. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO FILE A NEW STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-02-1997 CONTINUED FROM SEP-17-1997 TO NOV-05-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF PENSKE TRUCK LEASING CO
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FRESH CRAB AKA SAN FRANCISCO CRAB COMPANY AKA SAN FRANCISCO FRESH CRAB CO.
OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-05-1997, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSED.
